featureName: Trial Overage Banner + Lot Access Restriction
description: When a gestionnaire on free trial exceeds the FREE_TIER_LIMIT (2 lots), show a persistent banner warning that after trial ends, only the 2 oldest lots (by created_at) will remain accessible. After trial expires (read_only), enforce the restriction: locked lots appear greyed out with a 'Deverrouiller' CTA, lot detail pages block access, interventions on locked lots are restricted.

userStories.title: Add getAccessibleLotIds() service method + server action
userStories.description: As the system, I need a backend method to determine which lots are accessible for a team based on their subscription status, so that both UI and server-side checks can enforce the restriction consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: SubscriptionService.getAccessibleLotIds(teamId): returns null (all accessible) when active/trialing/free_tier_within_limit
Returns array of 2 oldest lot IDs (by created_at ASC, deleted_at IS NULL) when read_only AND actual_lots > FREE_TIER_LIMIT
New server action getAccessibleLots() wraps the service method for client-side use
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: getAccessibleLotIds on SubscriptionService + getAccessibleLots server action. Fail-open on query error.

userStories.title: Trial overage banner component
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire on trial with >2 lots, I want to see a persistent banner warning me that after my trial ends only my 2 oldest lots will remain accessible, so that I can subscribe before losing access.
acceptanceCriteria: TrialOverageBanner shows when status=trialing AND actual_lots > FREE_TIER_LIMIT
Message includes: number of lots at risk, which lots will be kept (2 oldest), days left
CTA 'S'abonner' navigates to /gestionnaire/settings/billing
NOT dismissible (critical warning, shows on every page load)
Follows existing TrialBanner design pattern (color scheme, layout)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Amber theme, non-dismissible, shows locked count + kept count + days left

userStories.title: Wire TrialOverageBanner into SubscriptionBanners + layout
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the overage banner to appear on every page (persistent in layout), with correct priority vs existing banners.
acceptanceCriteria: SubscriptionBanners priority: ReadOnly > TrialOverage > Trial
SubscriptionBanners passes actual_lots and FREE_TIER_LIMIT to TrialOverageBanner
Banner visible on all gestionnaire pages (persistent in layout)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Priority: ReadOnly > TrialOverage > Trial. Wired into SubscriptionBanners.

userStories.title: Enforce lot access restriction on biens list page
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire whose trial has expired (read_only), I want to see my locked lots greyed out with a 'Deverrouiller' CTA in the patrimoine list, so that I understand what I'm missing and can upgrade.
acceptanceCriteria: Biens page fetches accessible lot IDs via getAccessibleLots()
Lots NOT in accessible list: greyed out card, lock icon overlay, 'Deverrouiller' button
Clicking 'Deverrouiller' navigates to /gestionnaire/settings/billing
Clicking a locked lot card does NOT navigate to detail page
Accessible lots (2 oldest) render normally with full interaction
During trial (not expired): all lots render normally (no greying)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Semi-transparent overlay on locked cards. Direct rendering bypasses DataCards for isLocked support. List view blocks navigation for locked lots.

userStories.title: Enforce lot access restriction on lot detail page (server-side)
userStories.description: As the system, I need to block direct URL access to locked lots, so that users can't bypass the UI restriction by typing the lot URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Lot detail page (server component) checks if lot is accessible via getAccessibleLotIds()
If lot is locked: redirect to /gestionnaire/biens with toast message or show restricted view
If lot is accessible or subscription is active: render normally
Building detail page: locked lots in the lots grid show lock overlay (consistent with biens page)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Server-side redirect for locked lots. Building detail grid passes lockedLotIds to LotCardUnified. Fail-open on subscription check failure.

userStories.title: Restrict intervention creation on locked lots
userStories.description: As the system, I need to prevent creating interventions on locked lots, so that the restriction is enforced end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Intervention creation action checks if target lot is accessible
If lot is locked: return error 'Lot verrouille — souscrivez pour y acceder'
Existing interventions on locked lots: visible but read-only (no status changes)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Two helpers: checkLotLockedBySubscription (direct lot check) + checkInterventionLotLocked (looks up intervention lot first). Applied to create, update, approve, reject, startPlanning, finalize, cancel actions.
